d:
When casting this skill, Kordan raises his blade and challenges [[1]] enemy within [[1]] tile, immobilizing the target for [[5]]s. At the same time, he summons a hunting circle around him and his target, dealing [[180%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within the circle and knocking back other ranged enemies out of the circle.
The hunting circle stays active for [[16]]s. All units within the hunting circle take [[60%]] less damage and healing from any outside source. Meanwhile, allied units within the circle gain [[20%]] ATK, [[40]] Life Drain, and deal [[20%]] more damage. Kordan can keep only one circle active at a time. This skill starts with 1,000 Energy.
Increases the extra ATK, damage bonus, and Life Drain granted to allies within the circle to [[24%]], [[24%]], and [[45]] respectively.
Increases the extra ATK, damage bonus, and Life Drain granted to allies within the circle to [[28%]], [[28%]], and [[50]] respectively.
Increases the extra ATK, damage bonus, and Life Drain granted to allies within the circle to [[32%]], [[32%]], and [[55]] respectively.
Increases the extra ATK, damage bonus, and Life Drain granted to allies within the circle to [[36%]], [[36%]], and [[60]] respectively.

Kordan charges up briefly before unleashing a sweeping slash, dealing [[280%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy. He also gains a shield equal to [[100%]] of the damage dealt, plus an additional [[300%]]<ATK>. The shield lasts [[15]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[340%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[460%]]<ATK>.
Kordan leaps high, slamming his blade down on the enemy to deal [[350%]]<ATK> damage and knock them down.
Increases the damage dealt to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[450%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[500%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[20%]] during battle.

When Kordan achieves his first [[assist or defeat]] of a non-summoned enemy within the hunting circle, or after he has fought inside the circle for [[20]]s, his Fury Slash and Sundering Strike become enhanced. 
Enhanced Fury Slash: Deals extra damage equal to [[30%]] of the target's lost HP, up to [[600%]]<ATK>.
Enhanced Sundering Strike: Allows Kordan to also knock his target into the air, increasing the duration of the subsequent knockdown for [[2]]s and dealing [[300%]]<ATK> extra damage.
Increases the extra damage dealt by Fury Slash to [[35%]] of the target's lost HP, up to [[700%]]<ATK>. Also increases the extra damage dealt by Sundering Strike to [[350%]].

Each [[assist or defeat]] Kordan achieves against a non-summoned enemy inside the hunting circle permanently increases his Phys & Magic DEF by [[40%]], stacking up to [[3]] times. Each assist or defeat also restores [[15%]] of his max HP every second for [[3]]s.
Increases the extra damage dealt by Fury Slash to [[40%]] of the target's lost HP, up to [[800%]]<ATK>. Also increases the extra damage dealt by Sundering Strike to [[400%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Life Drain, 13 Ranged DEF.

d: Whenever Kordan [[assists or defeats]] an enemy inside the hunting circle, he leaps to a new target and moves the circle to his new position. Repositioning the circle extends its duration by [[10]]s. All allies within the circle also gain [[50]] Penetration.
